introDescription: Welcome to The Smart Calculator. By accessing and using our website, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

useOfServiceDescription: You agree to use our website and calculators for lawful purposes only. You may not:
prohibition1: Use the service to transmit harmful or malicious content

prohibition3: Copy, modify, or distribute our content without permission

disclaimerDescription: Our website and services are provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied.
limitationDescription: The Smart Calculator shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services.
intellectualPropertyDescription: All content, including text, graphics, logos, and software, is the property of The Smart Calculator and is protected by copyright laws.
userContentDescription: If you submit feedback, suggestions, or other content, you grant us the right to use, modify, and publish it without compensation.
linksDescription: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for their content or privacy practices.
terminationDescription: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend access to our services at any time without notice for violating these terms.
governingLawDescription: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the applicable jurisdiction.
changesDescription: We may update these Terms and Conditions from time to time. Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
contactDescription: If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at:
